meta.summary: RagTag 2.1.0 command-line runtime for reference-guided assembly correction, scaffolding, patching, scaffold merging, and AGP/PAF/Delta assembly utilities.
meta.description: RagTag 2.1.0 command-line runtime for reference-guided assembly correction, scaffolding, patching, scaffold merging, and AGP/PAF/Delta assembly utilities.

test: ragtag.py --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Tools for fast and flexible genome assembly scaffolding' >/dev/null && ragtag.py scaffold --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Homology-based assembly scaffolding' >/dev/null && ragtag.py patch --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Homology-based assembly patching' >/dev/null

minimap2 --version | grep -Fx '2.31-r1302' >/dev/null && unimap --version | grep -Fx '0.1-r41' >/dev/null && nucmer -V 2>&1 | grep -Fx '4.0.1' >/dev/null && samtools --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'samtools' >/dev/null
python3 -c 'import ragtag_utilities, intervaltree, networkx, numpy, pysam; print("ok")' | grep -Fx 'ok' >/dev/null
for cmd in minimap2 unimap nucmer delta-filter show-coords; do ldd "$(command -v "$cmd")" 2>&1 | grep -F 'not found' && exit 1 || true; done

tmp=/tmp/taf-ragtag-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; python3 -c 'import random; random.seed(7); seq = "".join(random.choice("ACGT") for _ in range(30000)); open("ref.fa", "w").write(">ref
" + seq + "
"); open("query.fa", "w").write(">ctg1
" + seq + "
")'; ragtag.py scaffold -f 1000 -t 1 -o mm2 ref.fa query.fa > mm2.log 2>&1 || { cat mm2.log >&2; exit 1; }; test -s mm2/ragtag.scaffold.agp; test -s mm2/ragtag.scaffold.fasta; grep -F 'ctg1' mm2/ragtag.scaffold.agp >/dev/null; ragtag.py agpcheck mm2/ragtag.scaffold.agp > agpcheck.txt 2>&1; grep -F 'complete with no errors' agpcheck.txt >/dev/null; ragtag.py asmstats mm2/ragtag.scaffold.fasta > asmstats.tsv; grep -F 'N50' asmstats.tsv >/dev/null; ragtag.py scaffold --aligner nucmer --nucmer-params '--maxmatch -l 100 -c 500' -f 1000 -o nucmer ref.fa query.fa > nucmer.log 2>&1 || { cat nucmer.log >&2; exit 1; }; test -s nucmer/ragtag.scaffold.agp; unimap -b24 -c ref.fa query.fa > unimap.paf 2> unimap.log || { cat unimap.log >&2; exit 1; }; test -s unimap.paf; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: RagTag
upstream.citation: Alonge et al. 2022, Automated assembly scaffolding elevates a new tomato system for high-throughput genome editing
